intro.title: Hello, I'm Zhengbing He
intro.desc:
Professor in Autonomous and Intelligent Systems, University of Nottingham Ningbo China.

✅ Research Funding: Principal Investigator, over $1 million for national key projects.

✅ Academic Output: 180+ published papers, 50+ in top journals including Transportation Research & IEEE Transactions. Completed full publication coverage of TR series (A/B/C/D/E/F), including 20+ TRC papers and 10+ TITS papers, plus one Nature Correspondence.

✅ Academic Metrics: Total citations > 8000, i10-index > 100, H-index > 40. IEEE Senior Member, listed in World’s Top 2% Scientists, ranked 67/30588 in Transportation & Logistics.

✅ Editorial Positions: Senior Editor of IEEE TITS, Deputy Editor-in-Chief of IET ITS, Associate Editor of IEEE TIV, Editorial Advisory Board Member of TR Part C.

✅ Research Scope: Urban mobility, system engineering and artificial intelligence. Covers traffic operation & control, sustainability, data-driven modeling, autonomous driving and LLM applications. I am a pioneer in AI traffic modeling, AV-based congestion relief and early explorer of generative AI in transportation.

item0.title: Pioneer in AI-Based Transportation Modeling
item0.desc:
Core research on driver behavior and traffic dynamic modeling.

🔹 2014: Proposed early kNN data-driven car-following model, cited nearly 200 times, widely recognized as classic pioneer work.
🔹 2019: Developed DBN & LSTM based deep learning lane-changing model, cited over 300 times.
🔹 Traffic Prediction: Led the first CNN-based network-wide speed prediction model with 1600+ citations.
🔹 Other works: Spatio-temporal trajectory prediction, GAN travel time prediction, shared mobility demand prediction, published in TRC, CACAIE and other top journals.

item1.title: Early Practitioner of LLM in Transportation
item1.desc:
One of the earliest teams applying large language models to intelligent transportation research.

🔹 Core direction: LLM intelligent driving assistance, prompt engineering optimization, AI agent route decision model.
🔹 Academic influence: Series early papers published in authoritative journals, leading the industry research trend.
🔹 Academic Exchange: Twice invited by SAE International in 2024 to share LLM traffic research achievements.
🔹 High-level achievement: Published Nature Correspondence in early 2026.

item2.title: Autonomous Driving Congestion Mitigation Strategy
item2.desc:
Dedicated to solving traffic congestion and emission problems based on autonomous vehicle technology.

🔹 Highway scenario: Proposed feedback control congestion relief strategy and jam-absorption driving strategy, published in IEEE TITS, cited over 300 times, widely recognized by Japanese and European scholars.
🔹 Urban scenario: Created innovative lane-free traffic operation system, extended to pedestrian participation scenarios, serial papers included in IEEE TIV, IEEE TVT and TRC.
🔹 Frontier research: Focus on surrounding vehicle motion prediction under intersection conflict scenarios, involving Transformer, CoT-LLM and World Model related methods.
🔹 International cooperation: Co-compiling influential review papers with scholars from MIT, Georgia Tech and TU Delft.

item3.title: Traffic State Perception & Visualization
item3.desc:
Systematic optimization and engineering application of traffic space-time analysis tools.

🔹 Main research: Cell mapping method, traffic wave aware construction, traffic emission estimation, data resolution improvement.
🔹 Practical landing: Wave-aware construction method has been applied to the famous American I-24 MOTION project.
🔹 Industry recognition: Related methods have been independently adopted by research teams in Britain, Sweden and China.

item4.title: Multidisciplinary Transportation Research
item4.desc:
Expand research boundaries and carry out diversified interdisciplinary research.

🔹 Research directions: Transportation system vulnerability assessment, traffic dynamics based carbon emission estimation, ride-hailing travel behavior analysis, experimental route selection modeling.
🔹 Academic summary: Published many highly cited review papers, sorting out trajectory research, automatic driving traffic and system resilience research progress, each paper cited more than 200 times.
🔹 Comprehensive ability: Reflects solid research foundation, team management experience and extensive academic influence.

item5.title: Intelligent Rice Transplanting and Harvesting Robot
item5.desc:
Agricultural embedded robot oriented to farm work scenarios.

🔹 Platform: Based on FreeRTOS system, equipped with DJI 3508 motor drive.
🔹 Function: Realize mechanical claw lifting and omnidirectional chassis movement, positioning accuracy ±5 mm.
🔹 Personal work: Participate in pneumatic structure design and hardware circuit wiring, complete dual robot cooperative operation development.

item6.title: SliverWolf Desktop Quadruped & Manipulator
item6.desc:
Open source lightweight desktop 12-degree-of-freedom quadruped robot.

🔹 Hardware: STM32F103 main control + MG92R high-precision steering gear.
🔹 Open source content: 3D structure drawing, PCB file, bottom firmware, voice control program.
🔹 Control mode: Bluetooth, IMU attitude, key operation, LD3320 voice recognition.
🔹 Realized actions: Walking, turning, crawling, handshake, intelligent grabbing and other interactive functions.

item7.title: 3508 Legged Robot Drive Test Platform
item7.desc:
Professional brushless motor quadruped robot algorithm verification platform.

🔹 Power scheme: DJI M3508 motor drive, iterated and optimized by the robot team for many years.
🔹 Core function: Adjustable PID parameters, stable standing, gyro attitude balance, lidar fixed height cruise.
🔹 Application scenario: Meet all gait debugging and field test requirements of ROBOCON competition legged robots.

item8.title: ROBOCON2024-PPS Positioning System
item8.desc:
Special high-precision planar positioning system for robot competitions.

🔹 Hardware architecture: STM32F103C8T6 + RS485 absolute encoder + omnidirectional wheel coding disc.
🔹 Core performance: Realize millimeter-level two-dimensional displacement recording, synchronously collect inertial attitude data.
🔹 Practical value: Provide accurate data support for robot autonomous positioning, path planning and automatic driving test.

item9.title: Typst Chinese Resume Template Library
item9.desc:
Efficient typesetting tool set suitable for academic and workplace resumes.

🔹 Resource content: Multiple sets of finished resume templates, preview images, avatar materials.
🔹 Use experience: Cooperate with VS Code plug-in to realize real-time preview and one-click export PDF.
🔹 Supporting documents: Complete compilation commands, batch export methods and font environment configuration tutorials.

item0.title: Robotics Engineer Learning Roadmap (Preview) - Lain-Ego on Zhihu
item0.desc:
Systematic learning route for robotics practitioners.
Covers motion control, environment perception, embedded development and SLAM positioning, with phased learning plans and high-quality resource classification.

item1.title: A Guide to Career Paths in the Robotics Industry — for High School Students - KKR Database on Zhihu
item1.desc:
Sort out all branches and development directions of the robotics industry.
Help students connect university major selection with future career planning, and clarify industry development layout.

item2.title: On the Organizational Maturity of University Robotics Competition Teams - KKR Database on Zhihu
item2.desc:
In-depth discussion on team stable operation mode.
Including team structure optimization, technical knowledge inheritance and multi-person collaborative management experience, suitable for long-term iteration of student teams.

event11.title: Internship at Qianxing Intelligence
event11.desc: Engaged in humanoid robot motion control and human-computer interaction related R&D work.

event10.title: Launched LocoWiki Resource Hub
event10.desc: Build a special knowledge platform for robot competitions and academic learning, integrating competition rules, technical sharing, paper lists and high-quality open source projects.

event12.title: Launched OpenDoge Open-Source Quadruped Crowdfunding
event12.desc: As one of the core founding developers, responsible for algorithm framework and underlying driver development. The project is scheduled to be officially delivered in late June 2026.

event1.title: Open-Sourced SliverWolf Desktop Serial-Link Quadruped
event1.desc: Officially open source self-developed desktop quadruped robot, integrating voice interaction and mechanical arm cooperative operation functions.

event2.title: 2024 ROBOCON National Competition
event2.desc: Complete the embedded control system development based on FreeRTOS, realize ±5 mm high-precision positioning, ball launching and clamping functions.

event4.title: Fujian Intelligent Marine Equipment Design Competition
event4.desc: Take the lead in completing the control system development of bionic lobster underwater robot and win the grand prize.

event5.title: 2024 World Marine Equipment Conference
event5.desc: Represent the school to participate in the exhibition, and the bionic underwater robot project was reported by Xinhua News Agency.

event6.title: 2025 ROBOCON National Competition
event6.desc: Independently complete the full stack development of legged robot, and win national second prizes in speed race, obstacle avoidance race and cross-country race.

event7.title: 2025 National Undergraduate Electronics Design Contest
event7.desc: Responsible for the hardware design and physical production of the ranging system power detection module, and won the national second prize.

event8.title: Open-Sourced BRS Parallel-Link Quadruped Robot
event8.desc: Open source all mechanical structure drawings and underlying control source code of self-designed parallel quadruped robot on GitHub.

event9.title: Internship at HighTorque Robotics
event9.desc: Participate in mechanical structure optimization, control algorithm iteration and system joint debugging of bionic quadruped robot, covering open source prototypes and commercial products.
